wiki.summary: "Benzi Box", sometimes spelled as "Benzie Box", is the fifth track from MF DOOM and Danger Mouse's collaborative album "THE MOUSE & THE MASK." The hook on this track is sung by Cee-Lo Green who also collaborated with producer Danger Mouse as the duo Gnarls Barkley. Read more on Last.fm.
